title: WathExtras
description: A general purpose addon for mapmakers for doctor4t's Harpy Express mod! (WATHE)
body:
### Building a train? Feel like you don't have enough options? WathExtras is here to help!
With over 40 blocks and 25 consumables, you can do much more than the base blocks added in base Wathe.

### Blocks
- 7 variants of Riveted Hulls
- Corrugated and Dark Corrugated Steel
- 8 Custom Ornaments
- Bleached and Verawood Planks
- Wall panelling for bleached, verawood, ebony, dark oak, and mahogany woods
- Several christmas blocks
- 4 variants of tiles
- Citrine Bricks
- Forterra Bricks
- Asphalt
- 13 Moquettes and 14 other carpets
- An instant kill block for map design
- Candelabras, stack lights, and other lights
- 4 bench variants
- Butterfly stoker door
- 11 plushies
- and more!

### Items
- 6 miscellaneous drinks
- 7 pride-themed drinks
- 4 milk variants
- 5 candies
- 6 gingerbread cookies

Questions? Join our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/sQ42fDZxJU)!
